class.help: Tabla codificadora de Competencias, en donde se registrará para cada una el Código, la Descripción y Observaciones.
class.label: Competencia
class.name: COMPETENCIA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_competencia as oi_competencia, t0.c_competencia as c_competencia, t0.d_competencia as d_competencia, SEC.policy, t0.c_competencia as CODE, t0.d_competencia as TEXT FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Competencias.COMPETENCIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_competencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_competencia asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_competencia as oi_competencia, SEC.policy FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Competencias.COMPETENCIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_competencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_competencia asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de Competencia. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_competencia

attribute.description: Descripción de Competencia. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_competencia

attribute.description: Observaciones de la Competencia. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 1000 caracteres.
attribute.label: Observaciones
attribute.name: o_competencia

assosiation.description: Registro de las aptitudes requeridas asociadas a un competencia.
assosiation.label: Aptitudes por competencia
assosiation.name: APTIT_COMP

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Competencias.COMPETENCIA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Competencias.COMPETENCIA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.oi_competencia) as CNT from ORG21_COMPETENCIAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.oi_competencia={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.d_competencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.c_competencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.oi_competencia as ID, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.c_competencia as COD, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.d_competencia as DES, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.c_competencia as c_competencia, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.d_competencia as d_competencia FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS WHERE ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.oi_competencia in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

class.label: Competencia - Aptitud Competencia
class.help: Registro de las aptitudes requeridas asociadas a un competencia.
class.name: APTIT_COMP

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Competencias.APTIT_COMP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Competencias.APTIT_COMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ORG21_APTIT_COMP.oi_aptit_comp) as CNT from ORG21_APTIT_COMP, ORG28_APTITUDES join ORG21_APTIT_COMP.OI_APTITUD inner ORG28_APTITUDES.OI_APTITUD Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ORG21_APTIT_COMP.oi_aptit_comp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ORG28_APTITUDES.d_aptitud,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ORG28_APTITUDES.c_aptitud,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and ORG21_APTIT_COMP.oi_competencia={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT ORG21_APTIT_COMP.oi_aptit_comp as ID, ORG21_APTIT_COMP.n_ponderacion as n_ponderacion, ORG28_APTITUDES.c_aptitud as COD, ORG28_APTITUDES.d_aptitud as DES, ORG28_APTITUDES.d_aptitud as DES_oi_aptitud FROM ORG21_APTIT_COMP, ORG28_APTITUDES JOIN ORG21_APTIT_COMP.oi_aptitud LEFT OUTER ORG28_APTITUDES.oi_aptitud WHERE ORG21_APTIT_COMP.oi_aptit_comp in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
